content: ITenantContext/IGroupContext interface placement in clean architecture: interface belongs in the Domain layer as an abstraction contract (similar to ICurrentUserService patterns). The implementation belongs in the Service/Infrastructure layer (reads from HttpContext claims, session, or cookie). The Repository layer's DbContext receives the resolved tenant ID via constructor injection of the scoped Domain interface. This respects the dependency rule: Domain defines the contract, Service implements it, Repository consumes it via the Domain interface.
